a: The transfer representation for the item.

t: Choosing a transfer representation for a model type
a: Define a custom representation for your data using a combination of built-in types.
A transfer representation for types that participate in Swift’s protocols for encoding and decoding.
Declare a transfer representation for your model types to participate in system sharing and data transfer operations.

The visibility level that specifies that any app or process can access the item.
